implementation_notes.A0-1: Test file already existed with 11 tests. Fixed autouse fixture to patch at correct module boundaries (photon_mlx.model.PhotonModel / photon_mlx.inference.PhotonInference) since _build_photon_deps uses lazy local imports. Changed load_checkpoint patch target to _load_photon_checkpoint (module-level wrapper).
implementation_notes.A0-2: Added to baseline_reporag/photon_pipeline.py: (1) _validate_repo_id() for HF repo-id allowlist, (2) _resolve_checkpoint_path() for root-containment + symlink-escape rejection, (3) _load_photon_checkpoint() lazy wrapper for testability, (4) checkpoint loading block in _build_photon_deps after PhotonModel construction, (5) model_id validation before tokenizer setup.
implementation_notes.A0-3: Existing photon_mlx/inference.py random-init detection (line 137) already fires when checkpoint_path is not set. No changes needed - the new code path emits WARNING via _build_photon_deps before PhotonInference is constructed.
implementation_notes.A0-4: Added GLOBAL_DEFAULT_GENERATION_MODEL_ID constant and test_baseline_yaml_generation_model_id_pinned() to tests/test_pipeline_factory_yaml_invariants.py. Correctly uses cfg.model.model_id (not cfg.generation.model_id) since baseline.yaml has model_id under the model: section.
implementation_notes.A0-5: Added commented checkpoint_path placeholder with Phase A instructions to configs/institutional_docs_photon.yaml under model: section.
implementation_notes.A0-6: Added PHOTON checkpoint environment variable documentation (PHOTON_CHECKPOINT_ROOT, PHOTON_ALLOW_RANDOM_INIT) to docs/deployment.md and checkpoint load failure troubleshooting guide to docs/troubleshooting.md.
implementation_notes.A0-7: ruff check: pass, ruff format: pass, full pytest: 1119 passed / 2 known pre-existing failures (test_generate_training_corpus.py).

summary: Phase A0 checkpoint loading implementation gap fix completed via TDD. New functions _validate_repo_id, _resolve_checkpoint_path, _load_photon_checkpoint added to photon_pipeline.py. _build_photon_deps now: (1) validates model_id against HF allowlist, (2) checks checkpoint root containment and symlink escape, (3) validates directory shape (weights.npz + state.json), (4) calls _load_photon_checkpoint(model, path), (5) handles failure via fail-fast (RuntimeError) or fail-soft (WARNING + continue) based on PHOTON_ALLOW_RANDOM_INIT env var. 11 new checkpoint tests + 6 invariant tests (1 new) all pass. Zero regressions in the full suite.
follow_up: Phase A: obtain mulmoclaude 600-step checkpoint, set PHOTON_CHECKPOINT_ROOT, update institutional_docs_photon.yaml checkpoint_path, run eval
Phase B/C/D: as specified in work-plan.md
